info.title: ListBee
info.summary: One API call to sell and deliver digital content.
info.description:
ListBee is a commerce API for AI agents, n8n workflows, and automation platforms. Create a listing with a title, price, and content — get back a checkout URL. Buyers visit the URL, pay via Stripe, and receive the content automatically.

## Quick Start
1. Get an API key from the developer console
2. Connect your Stripe account
3. `POST /v1/listings` with title + price + content
4. Share the checkout URL

## Authentication
Pass your API key as a Bearer token: `Authorization: Bearer lb_...`

post.description: Agent-initiated account creation. Sends a 6-digit OTP to the provided email. Idempotent — calling again re-sends the OTP. No authentication required.
Complete account creation with the OTP code from email. Returns the account and a fresh API key. The key is shown once — store it. If the account already exists, a new API key is created.

get.description: Account status and readiness. Check readiness.operational — if false, readiness.actions lists what's needed. readiness.next is the highest-priority action.

put.description: Update account settings. Currently supports ga_measurement_id for Google Analytics tracking on product pages and thank-you pages. Set to null to remove.

get.description: List all API keys for the authenticated account. Returns key prefix only, never the full key.

post.description: Create a new API key. The full key value is returned once in this response — store it securely. It will never be shown again.

delete.description: Revoke an API key. Cannot delete the key you are currently authenticating with.

409.description: Cannot delete the key used for this request.

post.description: Create a listing to sell digital content. Returns product page URL and readiness. If readiness.sellable is false, follow readiness.actions to resolve. readiness.next is the first action to take. When your account uses a Stripe test key, checkout URLs point to Stripe test mode.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` header value.

get.description: List all listings for the authenticated account. Each listing includes readiness status.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of listings to return.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of listings to return.

get.description: Get a single listing by slug. Check readiness.sellable — if false, readiness.actions tells you what's needed.

put.description: Update listing fields (price, description, metadata, etc.). Content is immutable — delete and recreate to change content. Returns updated listing with readiness.

delete.description: Delete a listing and its stored content. Irreversible.

post.description: Pause a listing. Paused listings cannot be purchased. Idempotent — pausing an already-paused listing returns 200.
Resume a paused listing. Idempotent — resuming an active listing returns 200.

get.description: List orders for the authenticated account. Filter by status, listing, and date range. Paginated.

parameters.name: created_after

schema.description: Only orders created after this ISO 8601 datetime.
schema.title: Created After

parameters.description: Only orders created after this ISO 8601 datetime.

parameters.name: created_before

schema.description: Only orders created before this ISO 8601 datetime.
schema.title: Created Before

parameters.description: Only orders created before this ISO 8601 datetime.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of orders to return.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of orders to return.

get.description: Get a single order by ID.

post.description: Set your Stripe secret key to accept payments. Use a test key (sk_test_...) for test mode — orders will use Stripe test checkout with no real charges. Switch to a live key (sk_live_...) for production.
Start Stripe Connect onboarding. Returns a URL to redirect the human to. Uses test mode if your Stripe account is in test mode.

delete.description: Remove Stripe configuration from account. Returns updated account with readiness.

get.description: List all webhook endpoints for the authenticated account.

post.description: Register a webhook endpoint. Returns the endpoint with its signing secret — store it, shown once.

put.description: Update a webhook endpoint. Only provided fields are changed.

get.description: List delivery event history for a webhook endpoint. Use to debug failed deliveries.

post.description: Send a test event to a webhook endpoint and return the delivery result. Does not persist an event record.

operational.title: Operational
operational.description: True when the account can sell. False means actions are needed.

actions.title: Actions
actions.description: What's needed to make this account operational. Empty when operational is true.

fee_rate.title: Fee Rate
fee_rate.description: Transaction fee rate as a decimal string (e.g. '0.10' = 10%)

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Account currency (ISO 4217, lowercase). Set automatically when Stripe is connected.

ga_measurement_id.title: Ga Measurement Id
ga_measurement_id.description: Google Analytics 4 Measurement ID (G-XXXXXXXXXX). Set via PUT /v1/account. Injected on all your product pages and thank-you pages

readiness.description: Account operational readiness. `operational` is true when the account can sell. If false, `actions` lists what's needed with kind (api/human), resolve details, and `next` points to the highest-priority action.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Time at which the account was created

total_revenue.title: Total Revenue
total_revenue.description: Total revenue in smallest currency unit (completed orders)

total_orders.title: Total Orders
total_orders.description: Total number of orders this month

code.description: Machine-readable action identifier for automation branching.

kind.description: Whether an agent can execute this directly (api) or needs human interaction (human).

message.title: Message
message.description: Human-readable explanation. AI agents relay this to users.
examples: Set Stripe secret key to accept payments

method.title: Method
method.description: How to resolve: HTTP method (POST, GET) for kind=api, 'redirect' for kind=human.

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: API endpoint path for kind=api actions.

url.title: Url
url.description: Full URL for kind=human actions (browser redirect).

params.title: Params
params.description: Example request body for kind=api actions.

has_more.title: Has More
has_more.description: Always false — API keys are not paginated.

cursor.title: Cursor
cursor.description: Always null — API keys are not paginated.

prefix.title: Prefix
prefix.description: First 8 characters of the key value

key.title: Key
key.description: Full API key value. Only present on creation — shown once, never again.

name.title: Name
name.description: Human-readable label for this API key.

name.title: Name
name.description: Product name shown on the product page

content.title: Content
content.description: The digital content to sell. A file URL (PDF, ZIP) is fetched and stored on CDN. A webpage URL is stored as a redirect. Plain text is stored as-is. Type is auto-detected.

description.title: Description
examples: A comprehensive guide to modern SEO techniques.

highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.description: Bullet-point feature badges. Keeps first 10 if more are provided

cta.title: Cta
cta.description: Buy button text. Defaults to "Buy Now"

cover_url.title: Cover Url
cover_url.description: Fetched and stored on CDN. If omitted, auto-generated from content type

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs forwarded in webhook events. Use for your own tracking

utm_source.title: Utm Source
utm_source.description: UTM source tag for Google Analytics. Defaults to 'listbee' if omitted

utm_medium.title: Utm Medium
utm_medium.description: UTM medium tag for Google Analytics. Defaults to 'product_page' if omitted

utm_campaign.title: Utm Campaign
utm_campaign.description: UTM campaign tag for Google Analytics. Defaults to the listing slug if omitted

compare_at_price.title: Compare At Price
compare_at_price.description: Strikethrough price in smallest currency unit. Must be greater than `price`

badges.title: Badges
badges.description: Short promotional badges. Keeps first 10 if more are provided

cover_blur.description: `true` always blurs cover, `false` never blurs, `auto` blurs for image files

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: Seller-provided aggregate star rating (1–5). Values outside this range are clamped automatically

rating_count.title: Rating Count
rating_count.description: Seller-provided review or purchase count, shown alongside the rating

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.description: Featured review cards. Keeps first 10 if more are provided

examples.content: Best decision I've made for my health.
examples.name: Clara D.

faqs.title: Faqs
faqs.description: FAQ accordion items. Keeps first 10 if more are provided

CreateListingRequest.title: CreateListingRequest
CreateListingRequest.description: All optional display fields (name, description, tagline, highlights, cta, badges, cover, reviews, faqs) appear on the product page buyers see.

name.title: Name
name.description: A name to help you identify this endpoint in the dashboard

url.title: Url
url.description: The HTTPS URL that will receive POST requests for each event

events.title: Events
events.description: Event types to subscribe to. Empty list subscribes to all events

total_count.description: Total number of matching resources across all pages

has_more.title: Has More

sellable.title: Sellable

description.title: Description
examples: A comprehensive guide to modern SEO.

readiness.description: Monetization readiness. `sellable` is true when buyers can complete a purchase. If false, `actions` lists what's needed with kind (api/human), resolve details, and `next` points to the highest-priority action.

has_more.title: Has More

created_at.title: Created At

type.title: Type

title.title: Title
title.description: Short, stable, human-readable label for the error category.

status.title: Status
status.description: HTTP status code echoed in the body.

code.title: Code

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: Star rating (1–5). Values outside this range are clamped automatically

UpdateListingRequest.description: Partial update — only provided fields are changed. Content is immutable.

enabled.description: Set to `false` to pause delivery without deleting the endpoint

api_key.title: Api Key
api_key.description: API key value. Shown once — store it securely.

total_count.title: Total Count

has_more.description: `true` if more results exist beyond this page

status.title: Status
status.description: Computed status: `delivered` if delivered_at is set, `failed` if attempts >= max_retries, otherwise `pending`.

max_retries.title: Max Retries
max_retries.description: Maximum delivery attempts before marking as failed

response_status.title: Response Status
response_status.description: HTTP status code from the last delivery attempt

last_error.title: Last Error
last_error.description: Error message from the last failed attempt

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Time at which the event was created

delivered_at.title: Delivered At
delivered_at.description: Time at which the event was successfully delivered

secret.title: Secret
secret.description: HMAC signing secret — use this to verify payload signatures

events.title: Events
events.description: Subscribed event types. Empty means all events

created_at.description: Time at which the endpoint was created

success.title: Success
success.description: `true` if the endpoint returned a 2xx status code

status_code.title: Status Code
status_code.description: HTTP status code returned by the endpoint

response_body.title: Response Body
response_body.description: Response body from the endpoint, truncated to 2000 characters

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message if delivery failed entirely

HTTPBearer.description: API key with `lb_` prefix. Pass as: `Authorization: Bearer lb_...`
